positive: A geometric, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouette at sunset. The style is graphic novel meeting minimalist linocut, utilizing strong, contrasting shapes and limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and slate gray. The central focus is the layered mountain profile, designed with clean, sharp edges and negative space optimization. Include abstract celestial elements like crescent moons and geometric constellations floating above the peaks. Composition must be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, suitable for a repeat apparel print. High detail, clean vector look, crisp lines, vibrant contrast, centered.
